title: Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: Rent of primary residence, Honolulu, HI (semiannual, 1982-84=100)
limitations: Captures contract rent paid by surveyed renter households — lags listing/spot rent indices like Zillow ZORI by 6-12 months.
Smoothed by BLS hedonic adjustments; sharp listing-rent moves are visibly muted in this series.
Honolulu only — neighbor-island rent dynamics may differ.
